_comment: Folio legal docs manifest. App fetches this on launch to know latest version. Bump version + summary when ToS/Privacy changes.

terms.summary_zh: v2.5：新增「停權通知與申訴」段（DSA 對齊）、揭露 OAuth 識別碼雜湊保留機制（防止規避停權重複註冊、5 年）
terms.summary_en: v2.5: Added 'Suspension Notice & Appeal' section (DSA-aligned), disclosing OAuth identifier hash retention for ban-evasion prevention (5 years)

privacy.summary_zh: v2.5.1：第三方處理者清單新增 Google Analytics for Firebase（用量分析 DAU / funnel）；揭露其收集 App 實例 ID、概略位置、App 互動事件，及 Folio 傳送之性別 / 年齡 / 心態分析維度
privacy.summary_en: v2.5.1: Added Google Analytics for Firebase to the third-party processor list (usage analytics, DAU / funnel); disclosed its collection of App Instance ID, coarse location, app-interaction events, plus the gender / age / mode dimensions Folio sends
